name: Hot Chocolate Float
recipeIngredient: 1 scoop ice cream (Chocolate-chip Mint or Peppermint)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mug, combine the warm water and instant cocoa mix.
2. Stir until well combined.
3. Add the ice cream to the mug and stir gently until melted and mixed in.
4. Serve immediately and enjoy your Hot Chocolate Float.
